title: ULTIMATE AUTH
description: UltimateAuth is a powerful, modern authentication system for offline-mode Minecraft servers. Packed with security features, full spawn control, IP-based registration limits, movement lockdown, blindness effects, and a polished user experience.
body:
**UltimateAuth is a secure, performance‑first authentication plugin for offline‑mode Paper servers. It delivers a clean login/register
  experience while locking down unauthenticated players to prevent impersonation, grief, and unauthorized access.**

  **Whether you run a small SMP or a large network, UltimateAuth ensures every player verifies before they can move, interact, or play — and
  everything is fully configurable.**

# Features

## ✔ Full Authentication Lockdown

  Unauthenticated players cannot:

  - Move or rotate their aim
  - Use commands (except /register, /login, /verify, /auth)
  - Break/place blocks, interact, drop/pickup items, or chat

  Optional protections:

  - Darkness effect while unauthenticated
  - Auth timeout with boss bar countdown
  - Title prompts during auth
  - Optional success title after login

  ## ✔ Configurable Locations

  - Auth Location: where players spawn until they authenticate
    /auth setauth
  - Spawn Location: where first‑time players go after their first successful auth
    /auth setspawn

  ## ✔ Security & Anti‑Abuse Tools

  - IP‑based registration limits
  - Join rate limiting
  - Brute‑force protection with lockout

  ## ✔ Admin Settings

  - In‑game settings GUI: /auth settings
  - Reload config: /auth reload

  ## ✔ Fully Configurable

  Every major feature can be toggled and tuned in config.yml.

  # Commands & Permissions

  | Command | Description | Permission |
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | /auth setauth | Set auth location | auth.admin |
  | /auth setspawn | Set spawn location | auth.admin |
  | /auth settings | Open settings GUI | auth.admin |
  | /auth reload | Reload plugin config | auth.admin |

### Server Ip

| Ultimate Auth Plugin              | Server          |
| -------------------- | -------------------- |
| This Plugin is available in this server   | play.hydraz.online            |
